# tapps-mcp

> MCP server for automated documentation generation, validation, and maintenance

## Tech Stack

- Python
- Pydantic
- uv (package manager)
- Docker
- GitHub Actions

## Entry Points

- `docsmcp` -> `docs_mcp.cli:cli`
- `tapps-mcp` -> `tapps_mcp.cli:main`
- `tapps-platform` -> `tapps_mcp.platform.cli:cli`
- `packages/docs-mcp/src/docs_mcp/__main__.py`
- `packages/docs-mcp/src/docs_mcp/cli.py`
- `packages/tapps-mcp/src/tapps_mcp/cli.py`
- `packages/docs-mcp/src/docs_mcp/server.py`
- `packages/tapps-mcp/src/tapps_mcp/server.py`

## Key Files

- `README.md`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `LICENSE`
- `pyproject.toml`
- `Dockerfile`
- `docker-compose.yml`
- `.docsmcp.yaml`
- `.hadolint.yaml`
- `.pre-commit-config.yaml`
- `.tapps-mcp.yaml`
- `docker-compose.dev.yml`

- `AGENTS.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
